+        "title": "Check current visual-studio-code-kubernetes-tools deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your visual-studio-code-kubernetes-tools version and configuration:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n visual-studio-code-kubernetes-tools -l app.kubernetes.io/name=visual-studio-code-kubernetes-tools
helm list -n visual-studio-code-kubernetes-tools 2>/dev/null || echo "Not installed via Helm"
```
This feature requires a working visual-studio-code-kubernetes-tools installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review visual-studio-code-kubernetes-tools configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant visual-studio-code-kubernetes-tools configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n visual-studio-code-kubernetes-tools -l app.kubernetes.io/name=visual-studio-code-kubernetes-tools
kubectl get configmap -n visual-studio-code-kubernetes-tools -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=visual-studio-code-kubernetes-tools
```
Hi,

Is it possible to add a snippet for the ReplicaSet ?

Thanks
Nicolas"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for ReplicaSet snippet",
+        "description": "Just starting to get into kubernetes myself. Here is a sample that might help. 

```
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: ReplicaSet
metadata:
  name: frontend
  labels:
    app: guestbook
    tier: frontend
spec:
  # modify replicas according to your case
  replicas: 3
  selector:
    matchLabels:
     
```yaml
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: ReplicaSet
metadata:
  name: frontend
  labels:
    app: guestbook
    tier: frontend
spec:
  # modify replicas according to your case
  replicas: 3
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      tier: frontend
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        tier: frontend
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: php-redis
        image: gcr.io/google_samples/gb-frontend:v3
```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n visual-studio-code-kubernetes-tools -l app.kubernetes.io/name=visual-studio-code-kubernetes-tools
kubectl get events -n visual-studio-code-kubernetes-tools --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm the feature described in "ReplicaSet snippet" is functioning correctly."
+      }
